violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth/towel stored on spray bottle. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Probe thermometer was not available for checking food temperatures during cold and hot holding and heating. Probe thermometers should be available for checking food temperatures.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation filters were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Rice was not adequately reheated. Found at 121F. Potentially hazardous foods should be reheated to 165F.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Thermometer was not available for checking cooking temperatures. Food should be checked for proper temperature before serving.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Water heater was not plugged in. Make sure truck is adequately prepared for operation.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
